subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1916-02-14 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: When in 'Akká seventy souls from among the Orthodox were required by the government to pay the poll-tax, yet, being poor, they remained helpless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: وقتی در عکا هفتاد نفر از ارتودکس ها را حکومت گرفت که جزیه بدهند،  ولی چون فقیر بودند عاجز ماندند
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @The Holy Spirit
